description_long: This building features a prominent hemispherical dome, characteristic of planetariums, mounted atop a cylindrical structure. The dome is flanked by a curved, modern annex with a flat roof, and an adjoining rectangular wing with a gently sloped roof, likely serving as an entrance or lobby. The exterior is finished in shades of blue and gray, with large windows and multiple entry points visible, suggesting public access. The structure sits on a broad, paved base with a distinct orange-brown walkway encircling the dome, providing both aesthetic appeal and functional circulation. The dome itself appears to house a telescope or projection equipment, as indicated by visible mechanical details. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern planetarium building with a large gray dome, blue cylindrical base, and attached rectangular wings, set on a paved area with a curved walkway.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance with large windows, the curved annex, and the prominent dome rising above the structure.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the cylindrical dome base, the sloped roof of the rectangular wing, and the orange walkway encircling the dome.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the dome, the curved walkway, and the secondary entrance or service area on the rectangular wing.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the connection between the dome and the flat-roofed annex, as well as the overall footprint of the building on its paved base.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features large glass doors beneath a flat awning, with wide steps leading up from the paved area and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing accessibility and modern design.
